arts.ttl: Ziyech Emerges as Potential Kvaratskhelia Replacement for Napoli
arts.sum: Napoli's search for Khvicha Kvaratskhelia's replacement has intensified, with Hakim Ziyech now emerging as a potential target. The Georgian star's imminent departure to Paris Saint-Germain has prompted the Napoli management to explore various options to fill the void. The post Ziyech Emerges as Potential Kvaratskhelia Replacement for Napoli appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Inter bounces back from Super Cup loss to beat Venezia and close gap to Napoli
arts.sum: Defender Matteo Darmian scored the only goal of the match in the 16th minute as Inter ground out a 1-0 win to move to within one point of Serie A leader Napoli, which played lowly Hellas Verona later Sunday. If Napoli wins that match, it will move four points clear of the defending champion, although Inter will have played two fewer matches.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth midfielder Billing joins Napoli on loan
arts.sum: Bournemouth's Denmark midfielder Philip Billing joins Serie A side Napoli on a season-long loan.

arts.ttl: Napoli set to target Rashford move - Sunday's gossip
arts.sum: Napoli set to try to sign Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford, PSG close to deal for Napoli winger Khvicha Kvaratskhelia, Barcelona interested in Newcastle United striker Alexander Isak, plus more.

arts.ttl: Man Utd handed Khvicha Kvaratskhelia boost
arts.sum: Antonio Conte has confirmed that Kvaratskhelia has asked to leave Napoli this month amid increasing speculation of a January transfer. Sport Italia have revealed that Napoli are interested in signing Alejandro Garnacho if Kvaratskhelia leaves the club in January, with Man Utd therefore potentially able to arrange a swap deal.

arts.ttl: Amorim rewards Garnacho with Arsenal chance amid Napoli interest: ‘He deserves it’
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has rewarded Alejandro Garnacho with a start in Manchester United’s FA Cup clash...

arts.ttl: Serie A | Napoli v Verona: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Napoli gear up to face Hellas Verona in their upcoming Serie A fixture, manager Antonio Conte is keeping a close eye on the fitness of wingers Khvicha Kvaratskhelia and Matteo Politano. Both players are inching closer to their comebacks from injury, but Conte may opt to stick with the same starting lineup that has served him well in recent matches. The post Serie A | Napoli v Verona: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Man Utd stance on Alejandro Garnacho transfer as Napoli line up £42m January transfer
arts.sum: Manchester United are open to selling their stars and Napoli boss Antonio Conte has identified Alejandro Garnacho as his primary target to replace Khvicha Kvaratskhelia this month

arts.ttl: Man United academy star 'wanted by Napoli' with Red Devils facing major January transfer decision
arts.sum: Napoli reportedly make contact with Manchester United over a deal for Alejandro Garnacho before the January transfer window closes for business.

arts.ttl: How much Napoli offered Kvaratskhelia to extend contract before PSG approach
